name: Instant Meshes
description: Remeshes 3D meshes into clean quad/triangle topology using Instant Meshes.

params_schema.label: Target face count
params_schema.tooltip: Number of faces in the output mesh. Lower = lighter, higher = more detail.

params_schema.label: Output topology
params_schema.tooltip: Quads for clean animation/subdivision topology. Triangles for game-ready meshes.

params_schema.label: Crease angle (°)
params_schema.tooltip: Preserves sharp edges above this dihedral angle. 0 = fully smooth, 30 = recommended for AI meshes.

params_schema.label: Smoothing iterations
params_schema.tooltip: More iterations = cleaner edge flow, but slower. 2–4 is usually optimal.
